title: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway dumped $400 million of HP stock in under 3 weeks
text: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway made another cut to its HP position this week. Buffett's company has now sold more than 12% of its stake for about $400 million this month.

title: Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.B) Continues to Offload HP (HPQ) Shares
text: Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.B) offloads a further $130 million worth of its stake in HP (HPQ) shares over three days in the last week, per filings.

title: Is Warren Buffett Giving Up on HP (HPQ) Stock?
text: HP (NYSE: HPQ ) stock investors are feeling the heat on Monday morning after Warren Buffett sold shares of HPQ. A filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) reveals that Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK-A ,NYSE: BRK-B ) sold shares of HPQ stock through a few transactions last week.

title: HP Inc. to Host Securities Analyst Meeting on October 10
text: PALO ALTO, Calif., Sept. 25, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ) will host its 2023 Securities Analyst Meeting on Oct. 10, 2023.

title: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway just dumped another $130 million of HP stock - and has now sold nearly $300 million worth this month
text: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway sold another chunk of its HP position last week, a filing shows. Buffett's company cashed out $130 million worth of the PC maker's stock, cutting its stake to 11.2%.

title: The Buffett List: 5 Dividend Buys For September
text: This Buffett holdings-list from Kiplinger first appeared 8/21/23 on line. Kiplinger, YCharts and Dogs of The Dow all track this Buffett/Berkshire batch. Here is your update from 9/20/23 YCharts data. 32 of 48 current Berkshire-Hathaway-owned-stocks pay dividends. title: HP Inc. Names David Meline to Board of Directors
text: PALO ALTO, Calif., Sept. 21, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ) today announced the appointment of David Meline to its Board of Directors. Meline is the former Chief Financial Officer for Moderna Inc., a global biotechnology and pharmaceutical leader. His appointment is effective November 1, 2023.

text: After years of factory closures and offshoring, manufacturing is returning to America. A 2022 report by the consulting firm McKinsey & Co. said that manufacturing in the U.S. is experiencing a “renaissance”.

title: Berkshire Hathaway sheds over 5 million shares from HP Inc stake
text: Berkshire Hathaway recently pared its stake in HP Inc. by several million shares, a SEC filing showed Wednesday. Its holdings of HP Inc now stand at 115.45 million shares.

title: Warren Buffett Powers Down HP Position
text: On Wednesday, Warren Buffett (Trades, Portfolio)'s Berkshire Hathaway Inc. ( BRK.A , Financial) ( BRK.B , Financial) revealed it trimmed its stake in HP Inc. ( HPQ , Financial) by 4.55%.

title: HP Shares Fall After Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway Sells Large Stake
text: HP Inc. (HPQ) shares were down more than 2% in midday trading on Thursday after Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.A) disclosed it reduced its holdings in the PC and printer maker by 4.5% this week.

title: Warren Buffett trims stake in HP Inc
text: Warren Buffett seems to be losing his patience with HP Inc (NYSE: HPQ) that has lost nearly 20% over the past two months. Berkshire unloaded $158 million of HPQ A regulatory filing this morning revealed Berkshire Hathaway Inc – his conglomerate holding company to have sold $158 million worth of HPQ this week.

title: Is Warren Buffett Giving Up on HP (HPQ) Stock?
text: HP (NYSE: HPQ ) stock opened in the red today after Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK-A , NYSE: BRK-B ) disclosed a partial sale of its stake. From Monday to Wednesday, the investment firm sold off 5.5 million shares.

title: HP Stock Sinks After Berkshire Hathaway Sells Stake
text: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway (BRK) sold 5.5 million shares of tech name HP Inc (NYSE:HPQ) for about $158 million.

title: HP stock falls as Warren Buffett sells shares
text: HP Inc (NYSE:HPQ) shares slipped 3% to $27.49 in early Thursday trading after a regulatory filing on Wednesday showed that Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway sold about $158 million worth of HP Inc stock in three days this week.   Berkshire unloaded 5.5 million shares at prices between $28 and $30, reducing its holding by 4.5% to 115 million shares, while are currently valued at about $3.3 billion.

title: Warren Buffett Is Finally Selling This Struggling Stock
text: Berkshire Hathaway loaded up on shares of HP last year, but the bet hasn't gone as planned. PC sales have collapsed, and HP's printing business continues to decline.

title: ‘Emerging markets have a China problem.' This strategist favors India, which just hit a record.

title: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway sells $158 million of HP stock in 3 days, taking its stake below 12%
text: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway cashed out $158 million of HP stock in three days this week. The investor's company still owns 11.7% of the PC maker, a position worth around $3.3 billion.

title: Nvidia and TSMC shares rise ahead of ARM IPO, HP stock falls on Berkshire Hathaway sale, and more movers
text: Shares of chipmakers Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. TSM, +0.82% rose 1.4% and Nvidia Corp. NVDA, +1.37% gained nearly 1% in premarket trading as U.K.-based chip designer ARM Holdings PLC ARM, heads for its Nasdaq trading debut on Thursday. Both companies are among a host of companies investing in ARM at the IPO price.

title: Berkshire Hathaway Sells 5.5 Million Shares of HP in Recent Days
text: The Berkshire open-market sale is its first of HP since the company accumulated a 12% stake in the PC maker in early 2022

title: HP: Deep Dive And What Does Buffett See In The Company?
text: HP is a large PC manufacturer and printing service provider, targeting a lower-end market. Despite a difficult outlook for 2023, Warren Buffett acquired a sizable stake in HP shares to the tune of $3.70B. HP lacks a strong economic moat due to a lack of product differentiation and pricing power, but its scale and reputation provide some competitive advantage.

title: 3 Stocks to Watch From the Challenging Computer Industry
text: The Computer - Mini Computers industry is suffering from waning demand for PCs and macroeconomic challenges. However, the strong demand for enterprise devices bodes well for Apple (AAPL), HP (HPQ) and 3D Systems (DDD).

title: Here's How To Play The PC Comeback, The Buffett Way
text: When the oracle of Omaha, the one and only Warren Buffett, decides to come out of his office and request his executing trader to place an order - and a big one at that - for a given company, investors globally should tune into his decision and attempt their best to reverse engineer it.

title: Miro and HP Team Up to Accelerate Collaboration & Innovation

(NYSE: HPQ) to accelerate innovation and enable seamless collaboration in digital workspaces.

title: 25% of Warren Buffett's Portfolio Is Invested in These 10 Boring Stocks
text: Buffett's "boring" stocks include financial services and consumer goods leaders as well as Japanese conglomerates. The legendary investor has always preferred businesses that he understands.

title: This Warren Buffett Stock Is a Strong Sell
text: HP is suffering declining sales in both its PC and printing businesses. While the PC market will stabilize and return to some level of growth, printing is likely in a long-term decline.

title: Is HP Stock a Buy Now?
text: HP posted a mixed second-quarter earnings report. It reduced its adjusted EPS and FCF guidance for the full year.
